Top Recurring Issues

⚠

CSV export failures

3 tickets

Resolved 0Escalated 3
“Export to CSV completes but the downloaded file only has headers and no rows.”
“The CSV file downloads, but several columns including customer name are empty even though they appear in the web table.”
⚠

Mobile login loop

2 tickets

Resolved 0Escalated 2
“On my iPhone in Safari I sign in, finish 2FA, and then land back on the login screen again.”
“After I enter the texted verification code on mobile Safari, the page flashes and sends me back to sign in.”
⚠

Other

1 tickets

Resolved 0Escalated 1
“I can log in from my laptop, but on iOS Safari I get kicked out immediately after the home page appears.”
🔥

What's Getting Escalated

📄

CSV export failures

3 escalated

CSV export issues are typically product bugs that frontline support cannot patch.

“Export to CSV completes but the downloaded file only has headers and no rows.”
🔒

Mobile login loop

2 escalated

Persistent login loops on mobile Safari usually need engineering investigation.

“On my iPhone in Safari I sign in, finish 2FA, and then land back on the login screen again.”
❓

Other

1 escalated

Needs manual review because it does not match a known frontline pattern.

“I can log in from my laptop, but on iOS Safari I get kicked out immediately after the home page appears.”
🎯

Recommendations

🎯

Repair CSV export reliability

CSV exports are repeatedly missing rows or columns, which breaks finance workflows and looks like a product bug rather than a one-off incident.

🚀

Fix the mobile login loop

Recurring mobile sign-in loops are the clearest blocker in the queue and keep reappearing across multiple tickets.

💬

Repair CSV export reliability

CSV exports are repeatedly missing rows or columns, which breaks finance workflows and looks like a product bug rather than a one-off incident.
